# English Plan IELTS

English Plan IELTS is an IELTS preparation app and learning space for Thai learners.

Core pages:
- https://www.englishplan-ielts.com/th/ - Thai IELTS prep hub
- https://www.englishplan-ielts.com/th/ielts-speaking-practice/ - IELTS Speaking practice
- https://www.englishplan-ielts.com/th/ielts-reading-practice/ - IELTS Reading practice
- https://www.englishplan-ielts.com/th/ielts-writing-checker/ - IELTS Writing checker and guide
- https://www.englishplan-ielts.com/th/ielts-mock-test/ - IELTS mock test workflow

Official video channel: https://www.youtube.com/@DoyLanguagePlan
